description.en: Granada's IGP village bread, baked exclusively on the stone floor of wood ovens fed with local mountain timber; no other oven type is permitted. Alfacar's spring water is credited for its character, giving a mild sourdough tang under a thick, crackling crust.
description.de: Granadas g.g.A.-Dorfbrot, ausschließlich auf dem Steinboden von mit lokalem Bergholz befeuerten Holzöfen gebacken, kein anderer Ofentyp ist erlaubt. Dem Quellwasser von Alfacar wird sein Charakter zugeschrieben: milder Sauerteig-Biss unter dicker, krachender Kruste.
description.es: El pan de pueblo con IGP de Granada, horneado solo sobre la piedra de hornos de leña con madera de la sierra local; no se permite otro tipo de horno. Al agua de manantial de Alfacar se le atribuye su carácter: un toque ácido suave bajo una corteza gruesa y crujiente.
description.fr: Le pain de village IGP de Grenade, cuit uniquement sur la pierre de fours à bois alimentés par le bois local de la sierra; aucun autre four n'est autorisé. L'eau de source d'Alfacar lui donnerait son caractère: une pointe acidulée douce sous une croûte épaisse et croustillante.

origin.note: IGP since 2011; the disciplinare permits baking only directly on a wood-fired oven's stone floor, no other oven type.

yield.shape: round hogaza or ring-shaped rosca; also small bollos

keeping.note: A wood-fired crust and a mild sourdough tang keep it in good shape for a few days past baking.

method.title: Mix
method.summary: Combine water, starter and yeast by hand, then work in the flour until a rough dough forms.

method.title: Aerate
method.summary: Knead until elastic, dividing the dough into pieces and reuniting them to work in air, then knead in the salt dissolved in a little water.

method.title: Bulk ferment
method.summary: Let rise 2.5 to 4 hours at around 21°C until doubled.

method.title: Shape
method.summary: Shape into a round hogaza, a ring-shaped rosca, or small bollos depending on the format wanted.

method.title: Bake with steam
method.summary: Load into a wood-fired, stone-floored oven preheated to 250°C, add steam, then step the temperature down from 230°C to 210°C over about 35 minutes.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Rest on a rack before slicing so the crust and crumb finish setting.

source.adaptation: Grams as published for a 1 kg loaf; hydration and starter share line up with the IGP's own published minimums (55-60% hydration, at least 10% masa madre).
